ddls:
CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "garment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID to which the garment type belongs */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the garment type can be customized */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the garment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is required for the garment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_measurements" (
  "garment_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment measurement */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the garment (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fit */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default measurement for the brand and fit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_fit_id FOREIGN KEY ("fit_id") REFERENCES fits ("fit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "numeric_value" INTEGER /* Numeric value corresponding to the size */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size can be customized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fits" (
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit */,
  "fit_name" TEXT /* Name of the fit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fit */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the fit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_fit_measurements" (
  "garment_fit_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment fit measurement */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fit */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the garment */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default measurement for the brand and fit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_fit_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_fit_measurements_fit_id FOREIGN KEY ("fit_id") REFERENCES fits ("fit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_fit_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_fit_measurements_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_fit_measurements_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fit */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_fit_id FOREIGN KEY ("fit_id") REFERENCES fits ("fit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Default shipping address for the user */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Default billing address for the user */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
